description_long: This is an adult female pedestrian figure with a slender build, depicted in a standing pose with arms slightly outstretched. She is dressed in lingerie-style attire, including a bra, panties, garter belt, and thigh-high stockings, all featuring delicate straps and lace details. Her feet are covered with high-heeled shoes, and her posture is upright and balanced. The figure's skin is smooth and evenly toned, and her facial features are softly modeled. She has a voluminous updo hairstyle, adding height and a distinctive silhouette. The overall appearance is stylized and detailed, suitable for urban or fashion-oriented environments.
description: A slender adult female figure in lingerie with thigh-high stockings, high heels, and a voluminous updo hairstyle, standing upright with arms outstretched.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed lingerie, garter belt, stockings, and facial features with arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the body, the updo hairstyle, and the contour of the high heels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the lingerie, the garter straps, and the full volume of the updo hairstyle.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile and the side details of the outfit and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: lingerie set with bra, panties, garter belt, and thigh-high stockings
